title: S&P 500 Stock Market Winners Today
text: Oil stocks were S&P 500 winners Monday, including Diamondback Energy. Bristol Myers Squibb was among the big losers.

title: Why Occidental Petroleum, Diamondback Energy, and Battalion Oil Corporation Soared Today
text: Supply concerns on the international front caused the price of oil to rise.

title: The 8 Most Profitable U.S. Companies Practically Print Money
text: Imagine companies three times as profitable as the S&P 500 — putting them in a good position to handle whatever comes next. The post The 8 Most Profitable U.S. Companies Practically Print Money appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Paying Dividends: Energy Companies Dominate Top-Yielding Stocks in S&P 500
text: Oil and gas producers have adopted so-called variable dividends that are keyed to profits at a time of high energy prices.

text: Most oil dividend stocks jumped alongside crude oil prices, but one company could head even higher.

text: Oil prices retreated to a seven-month low, below pre-invasion levels.

title: 10 Growth Stocks Analysts Say You'll Be Glad You Bought
text: Keeping a list of S&P 500 growth stocks you'd like to own is a good idea. And it might pay off sooner than you think.

title: The 7 Best Stocks to Buy for August 2022
text: Coming off its best month since November 2020, it will be tough for the S&P 500 in August to match the 9.1% return it notched in July. The best stocks to buy in August may be some of the best performers from July.

title: Watch These 5 Stocks That Increased Their Dividends Of Late
text: Stocks like BP, SunCoke Energy, Pioneer Natural Resources, Northern Oil and Gas, and Diamondback Energy have lately hiked their dividend payments.

title: Diamondback (FANG) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Dividend Up
text: Diamondback (FANG) second-quarter earnings and revenues outperform the consensus mark. Diamondback hikes the dividend.

title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) CEO Travis Stice on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 2, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Adam Lawlis - VP, IR Travis Stice - CEO & Chairman Daniel Wesson - Executive VP & COO Kaes Van't Hof - President & CFO Conference Call Participants Neal Dingmann - Truist Securities Scott Hanold - RBC Capital Markets David Deckelbaum - Cowen and Company Doug Leggate - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Arun Jayaram - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Leo Mariani - MKM Partners Jeanine Wai - Barclays Bank Paul Cheng - Scotiabank Nicholas Pope - Seaport Research Partners Derrick Whitfield - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Vincent Lovaglio - Mizuho Securities Neil Mehta - Goldman Sachs Group Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by, and welcome to the Diamondback Energy's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Diamondback (FANG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.16% and 10.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Shale Oil Stocks Drop Ahead Of Quarterly Earnings
text: Shale oil producers will be reporting quarterly results this week, coming on the heels of energy giants Exxon Mobil, Chevron and Shell all posting record profits.

title: 7 Oversold Energy Stocks to Buy Now
text: With energy prices down from their multi-year highs, bullishness for stocks in the space has cooled recently. Shares that spiked in tandem with soaring crude oil and natural gas prices have pulled back.
